case_title: XIAO PING JIANG VS. GUSTAVO PESSOA ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING AS TO DEFENDANT PESSOA, GUSTAVO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2015
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-01-2015 CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57036649) FILED BY DEFENDANT PESSOA, GUSTAVO
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 57036649) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT PESSOA, GUSTAVO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-01-2015. THE MAY-13-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-11-2015.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR SONJA ELIZABETH BLOMQUIST.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PAUL RAYMOND PERDUE.
ARBITRATOR DANIEL K. DENENBERG APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-12-2015 THROUGH SEP-10-2015.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-05-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 15301075) FILED BY ATTORNEY VANNUCCI, JOHN FITZPATRICK
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ARBITRATION (TRANSACTION ID # 15349068) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING
FEE PAID FOR STIPULATION AND ORDER TO EXEND ARBITRATION CUTOFF; (TRANSACTION ID # 15356036) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING
STIPULATION TO EXTEND ARBITRATION JURISDICTION DEADLINE; FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-05-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-05-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH MAR-04-2016. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JAN-05-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
*FEE PAID* STIPULATION AND (PROPOSED) ORDER EXTENDING ARBITRATION JURISDICTION DEADLINE AND OSC (TRANSACTION ID # 58699056) FILED BY DEFENDANT PESSOA, GUSTAVO
STIPULATION EXTENDING ARBITRATION JURISDICTION DEADLINE AND OSC FILED BY PESSOA, GUSTAVO JIANG, XIAO PING

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-05-2016 CONTINUED TO JUN-07-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH MAY-06-2016. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON APR-05-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ARBITRATION (TRANSACTION ID # 16089087) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING
OSC RESPONSE RE ARBITRATION/MEDITION (TRANSACTION ID # 16154039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-07-2016 CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH JUL-08-2016. *** NOTE: TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF JUDICIAL ARBITRATION, PLEASE COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 4.1 L. *** ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUN-07-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR DENENBERG, DANIEL K.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ARBITRATION/MEDIATION (TRANSACTION ID # 16196013) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-14-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED AUG-09-2016 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PESSOA, GUSTAVO $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,000.00, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-14-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 59858405) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIANG, XIAO PING AS TO DEFENDANT PESSOA, GUSTAVO
